title: print_the_current_date_to_tmpd
content: Print the current date to /tmp/date.txt | SUCCESS: Printed the current date to /tmp/date.txt. The file contains: "Sat Apr  4 17:58:52 UTC 2026" | SUCCESS

title: read_the_file_at_tmpdatetxt_an
content: Read the file at /tmp/date.txt and append the contents to /tmp/date_copy.txt | SUCCESS: Appended contents of /tmp/date.txt to /tmp/date_copy.txt | SUCCESS
